formulas.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales general and administrative equals Total operating expenses
formulas.operation: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative

formulas.formula: Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other income expense net equals Total other income expense net
formulas.operation: Interest income - Interest expense + Other income (expense), net

formulas.formula: Operating income plus Total other income expense net equals Income before income tax
formulas.operation: Operating income + Total other income (expense), net

formulas.formula: Income before income tax minus Income tax expense equals Net income
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense

formulas.formula: Sum of current assets equals Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total current assets plus noncurrent assets equals Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Sum of current liabilities equals Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities plus noncurrent liabilities equals Total liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Sum of equity components equals Total shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Total assets - Total liabilities and shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Sum of operating activity components equals Net cash provided by operating activities
components: Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization + Deferred income taxes - Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net - Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Sum of investing activity components equals Net cash used in investing activities
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities + Purchases of marketable securities + Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets + Purchases of non-marketable equity securities + Acquisitions, net of cash acquired
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.formula: Sum of financing activity components equals Net cash used in financing activities
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to employee stock plan taxes
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans + Payments related to repurchases of common stock + Payments related to employee stock plan taxes + Dividends paid + Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets + Repayment of debt
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: CFO plus CFI plus CFF equals Change in cash
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash used in investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.result_label: Change in cash and cash equivalents

formulas.formula: Beginning cash plus Change in cash equals Ending cash
components: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
Change in cash and cash equivalents
Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period + Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.result_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period

xbrl_not_on_statement.reason: Non-cash operating lease right-of-use asset obtained in exchange for lease obligations disclosed as supplemental information in Note 14 leases, not on CF statement face
Operating cash flow used for operating leases disclosed as supplemental information in Note 14 leases, embedded within net cash from operations
Property equipment and intangible assets acquired but not yet paid disclosed in Note 8 Balance Sheet Components as supplemental non-cash information

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income starting CF
Ending cash on CF matches Cash on BS current period
Beginning cash on CF matches Cash on BS prior period
Retained earnings change on BS equals Net income minus Dividends minus Share repurchases charged to retained earnings
cross_statement_checks.notes: From XBRL SE statement: net income 45197, dividends 488, repurchases to retained earnings 24010 per RetainedEarningsMember context c-39. Change = 45197 - 488 - 24010 = 20699. Beginning RE 68038 + 20699 = 88737 ending RE.

operating_leases.current_location: Embedded within Accrued and other current liabilities on the balance sheet face per OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList tag pointing to AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent; broken out separately in Note 8 accrued liabilities table as Operating leases line item

depreciation_and_amortization.notes: Single line on CF statement. Notes disclose intangible amortization separately: 243M for H1 2026. Segment note discloses C&N D&A 684M and Graphics D&A 252M for H1 2026 totaling 936M, which excludes acquisition-related intangible amortization 243M; 936+243=1279 approximately equals 1280 CF line.

capex.notes: CF line labeled Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets uses PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets concept. Note 8 discloses property equipment and intangible assets acquired but not yet paid of 1.1 billion for H1 FY2026.

short_term_debt.notes: No short-term debt on balance sheet. Commercial paper balance is zero per filing. 3.20% Notes Due 2026 with 1.1 year remaining term are classified as LongTermDebtNoncurrent. No current portion of long-term debt separately disclosed.

interest_expense.source: Interest expense of 124M (us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating) and interest income of 1108M (us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest) are separately disclosed on IS for H1 FY2026. Gross interest expense is 124M. No separate gross/net split needed as they are already presented separately.

flags: Effective rate of 14.9% is below US federal statutory rate of 21% due to foreign-derived deduction eligible income, SBC, lower-rate jurisdictions, and R&D credits per Note 4

business_segments.notes: Segment totals match consolidated revenue. Operating income reconciliation to pretax income includes SBC, unallocated costs, acquisition-related costs, interest income, interest expense, and other income net.

product_service.notes: Data Center Compute and Networking are sub-categories of Data Center; top-level sum uses Data Center plus Gaming plus Professional Visualization plus Automotive plus OEM and Other

corrected_components.label: Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net
Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities

formula_checks.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales general and administrative equals Total operating expenses
Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other income expense net equals Total other income expense net
Operating income plus Total other income expense net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense equals Net income
Sum of current assets equals Total current assets
Total current assets plus noncurrent assets equals Total assets
Sum of current liabilities equals Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities plus noncurrent liabilities equals Total liabilities
Sum of equity components equals Total shareholders equity
Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Sum of operating activity components equals Net cash provided by operating activities
Sum of investing activity components equals Net cash used in investing activities
Sum of financing activity components equals Net cash used in financing activities
CFO plus CFI plus CFF equals Change in cash
Beginning cash plus Change in cash equals Ending cash
